name: Coloring Cats: Sports With Friends
short_description: Help Buddy and Lucky develop their sports photos! Paint each character, color by color, pixel by pixel, in a relaxing experience full of friendship, fun, and sports!
detailed_description:
Buddy and Lucky love capturing joyful moments of their friends practicing all kinds of sports. With their camera always ready, they turn these fun memories into charming pixel-art photographs — and you’re invited to help develop them!

The photos are already taken, but it’s up to you to bring each scene to life — character by character, pixel by pixel — transforming simple silhouettes into colorful snapshots full of personality.

🖼️ Choose from 10 unique photos full of friendship, fun, and sports
🎨 Color over 60 characters across 10 vibrant photos, each filled with style and movement
🖱️ Use cozy, intuitive tools like the Eye and Lock buttons to paint at your pace
🎧 Relax with a lighthearted soundtrack composed by Taty Jaques
🧩 Enjoy delightful pixel art created by Kátia Numakura
📸 Complete your collection and fill the photo album with your finished creations

Whether you’re into coloring, pixel art, or just looking for a relaxing moment, join Buddy and Lucky in celebrating friendship through sports — one pixel at a time.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
